title: rootless: unhelpful error message when the user is not in /etc/sub{uid,gid}
body:
Unfortunately the error message is just `Failed`.

**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST?**:

> /kind bug

**Description**

```
$ ./bin/podman --log-level=debug pull docker.io/library/busybox
DEBU[0000] [graphdriver] trying provided driver "vfs"
INFO[0000] Found CNI network crio-bridge (type=bridge) at /etc/cni/net.d/100-crio-bridge.conf

DEBU[0000] parsed reference into "[vfs@/home/tt/.local/share/containers/storage+/run/user/1000/run]docker.io/library/busybox:latest"
Trying to pull docker.io/library/busybox...DEBU[0000] Using registries.d directory /etc/containers/registries.d for sigstore configuration
DEBU[0000]  Using "default-docker" configuration

DEBU[0003] Overall: allowed

DEBU[0003] GET https://registry-1.docker.io/v2/library/busybox/blobs/sha256:8c811b4aec35f259572d0f79207bc0678df4c736eeec50bc9fec37ed936a472a
Getting image source signatures
DEBU[0004] Manifest has MIME type application/vnd.docker.distribution.manifest.v2+json, ordered candidate list [application/vnd.docker.distribution.manifest.v2+json, application/vnd.docker.distribution.manifest.v1+prettyjws, application/vnd.oci.image.manifest.v1+json, application/vnd.docker.distribution.manifest.v1+json]

Copying blob sha256:07a152489297fc2bca20be96fab3527ceac5668328a30fd543a160cd689ee548
```

comments.body: Okay, I just read https://github.com/projectatomic/libpod/issues/1073 once more and realized this issue is a duplicate. Would it make sense to enhance the error message?
I like the containers/storage patch, but I still think podman should give a nice error telling them to add an entry to /etc/subuid.
